name: remote-pi
description_en: Mobile remote control and local agent mesh for the Pi coding agent. Pair your phone via QR over a relay, watch tool calls in real time, run multi-Pi sessions over a local Unix Domain Socket broker, and let agents talk to each other through structured requ
description_zh: Pi 编码代理的移动远程控制和本地代理网格。通过中继上的 QR 配对手机，实时查看工具调用，通过本地 Unix Domain Socket 代理运行多 Pi 会话，并通过结构化请求让代理相互通信
